features: Rebuilt Guard Approvals page into command-center onboarding review layout
Added KPI row: Total Applications, Pending Review, Approved Today, Rejected, Interview Needed, Missing Docs
Added tabs: All Applications, Pending, Interview, Approved, Rejected
Added filters: Status, Rank, Experience, Background Check, Sort
Added applicant table with checkbox, applicant, rank, experience, license status, background check, availability, submitted, status, actions
Added selected applicant right rail with profile, contact info, experience, guard card, availability, certifications, onboarding checklist, and notes
Added Approve Guard, Reject Application, Request Info, Schedule Interview, Search, Refresh, Pagination, Rows per page
Approve/reject uses the existing signup approval/rejection flow when the row is a signup
Request info and interview use local workflow state without requiring new SQL
